entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: damothy (eaudeparfum)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,750Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 91

entry.title: i, alone, tie my bonds
entry.summary:
Author: damothy (eaudeparfum)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,230Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: They are born already falling. Not in the sense of gravity, but more of a trajectory: two points flung across a map that has already been drawn, a path etched long before either of them learns how to walk it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Batcest Baby #1
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,074Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 22

Summary: Second trimester of Dick's baby with Bruce.Dick starts to recover from the strain the first trimester put him through, starts seeing the changes on his body and he doesn't know why it makes him feel so strange. Guilt for not being intimate with his partners hurts his relationship but Bruce, Jason, Tim and Damian show him how much they love him regardless.(Tags will be added/edited as I update chapters, reading the previous parts will help you understand their relationship, and this is your DEAD DOVE warning)Enjoy!

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,435Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 36

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Pining for Tim Drake
entry.summary:
Author: ElentiyaG

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,850Chapters: 57/57Kudos: 1,138

Summary: Dick Grayson was completely blindsided. Since when was Tim Drake, his Baby Bird, an adult? Since when was Baby Bird an attractive adult? Isn’t he still like 12 years old and knocking on his door in Bludhaven?   I have been editing earlier chapters in between new updates!

entry.title: Birthday Gift
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,497Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 125

Summary: Damian's eighteenth birthday is a pretty quiet affair. Just family, a couple of his friends from school, a couple of his super friends. Dick drives up from Bludhaven with a gift. All through dinner, through cake and gifts, all eyes are on Damian. His family's more than others. Bruce watches him with a hooded gaze. Jason like a cat watching a mouse. Tim hovers close, hungry. But Damian gravitates toward Dick. Lets Dick ruffle his hair and pull him against his side and kiss his cheek. None of the other guests think anything of it. Dick's always been open with his affection. Damian tolerates it. So when the party is over and the guests leave, it's Dick he lets trail after him to his bedroom._____Damian is eighteen. Dick has been waiting a long time.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: For the second time
entry.summary:
Author: Zaeriiii

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,389Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 85

Summary: "I love you," Damian corrects. "Present tense. Not past. That hasn't changed, Tim. You might not remember me, but I remember you. Every part of you."It’s too much. Too intense, too honest."I don't know how to return that," Tim admits."I’m not asking you to. I’m only asking you to let me... be here. Let me show you who I am now. And then you decide.""Decide what?""If you can love me again."
